notes: V2 (2nd generation); 3 mist output levels: 150/200/250 ml/h; humidity setpoint 45-90% RH in 5% increments plus continuous mode; includes 80cm cable hygrostat probe for canopy-level sensing; dual 360-degree rotatable nozzle; remote control included; runtime_hours_max derived from ~3.25L effective usable volume at 150 ml/h minimum setting (~13h at max 250 ml/h confirmed by German retailers); no dedicated external controller input — basic on/off via outlet-based controller is theoretically possible but undocumented; Amazon.de ASIN B07H9CMJ57 is listed as 'Humipro+' variant and was showing as unavailable at time of research; German retail prices vary widely €45-80; manufacturer page has sparse specs — technical values cross-referenced across multiple independent EU/German retailers (gogrow.de, farmbros.de, grow-zen.de, pevgrow.com)
